themeCSS: .flowchart-link { stroke-width: 3px !important; } .arrowMarkerPath { stroke-width: 2px !important; } .node rect, .node polygon, .node circle, .node .basic { stroke-width: 2.5px !important; } .cluster rect { stroke-width: 2.5px !important; } .edgeLabel { font-size: 18px !important; } .messageText { stroke-width: 2px !important; } .messageLine0, .messageLine1 { stroke-width: 2.5px !important; } .activation0, .activation1, .activation2 { stroke-width: 2px !important; } .actor-line { stroke-width: 2.5px !important; }
